mapper.sql: storeGroupId, storeId, groupName, groupAddr, groupImg, createdDate
mapper.insert:
insert into store_group
storeGroupId,
storeId,
groupName,
groupAddr,
groupImg,
createdDate,
#{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{groupName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{groupAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{groupImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update store_group
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
groupName = #{groupName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
groupAddr = #{groupAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
groupImg = #{groupImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where storeGroupId = #{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_group set storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, groupName = #{groupName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, groupAddr = #{groupAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, groupImg = #{groupImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where storeGroupId = #{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select storeGroupId, groupName from store_group where status=1

select * from ( SELECT sg.groupName, sg.groupImg, sg.storeGroupId,sa.city, (select count(1) from store_attention sat where sat.storeGroupId = sg.storeGroupId and sat.attentionStatus = 1) AS menberNum, (select count(1) from dynamic dy where dy.socialGroupId = sg.storeGroupId) AS dynamicNum, round( 6378.138 * 2 * asin( sqrt(pow(sin((#{userLat} * pi() / 180 - latitude * pi() / 180 ) / 2),2) + cos(#{userLat} * pi() / 180) * cos(latitude * pi() / 180) * pow( sin((#{userLng} * pi() / 180 - longitude * pi() / 180) / 2),2))) *1000) AS distance FROM store_group sg inner join store_address sa on sg.storeAddrId = sa.storeAddrId where sg.status=1 ORDER BY distance ASC ) A order by city, menberNum desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT count(*) FROM store_address sa inner join store_group sg on sg.storeAddrId = sa.storeAddrId
AND sa.province LIKE concat('%',#{province},'%')
AND sa.city LIKE concat('%',#{city},'%')
AND sa.zone LIKE concat('%',#{zone},'%')
AND sg.status=1

SELECT sg.storeGroupId, sg.groupName, sg.groupImg, (select count(1) from store_attention sat where sat.storeGroupId = sg.storeGroupId and sat.attentionStatus = 1) AS menberNum, (select count(1) from dynamic dy where dy.socialGroupId = sg.storeGroupId) AS dynamicNum FROM store_group sg WHERE sg.status=1 order by dynamicNum desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT count(*) FROM store_group WHERE status=1

SELECT sg.storeGroupId, sg.groupName, sg.groupImg, (select count(1) from store_attention sat where sat.storeGroupId = sg.storeGroupId and sat.attentionStatus = 1) AS menberNum, (select count(1) from dynamic dy where dy.socialGroupId = sg.storeGroupId) AS dynamicNum FROM store_attention sa inner join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = sa.storeGroupId where sa.observerId = #{userId} and sg.status=1 order by dynamicNum desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT count(*) FROM store_attention sa inner join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = sa.storeGroupId where sa.observerId = #{userId} and sg.status=1

select sg.storeGroupId, sg.groupName, sg.groupAddr, sg.groupImg, (select sa.attentionStatus from store_attention sa where sa.storeGroupId = sg.storeGroupId and sa.observerId = #{observerId}) as attentionStatus from store_group sg where sg.storeGroupId = #{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl from store_attention sa inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = sa.observerId where sa.storeGroupId = #{storeGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select dy.dynamicId, dy.publishId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, dy.content, dy.publishImgUrl, dy.socialGroupId, case when dy.socialGroupId is null then 0 when dy.socialGroupId=0 then 0 else 1 end as moreFlag, (select sg.groupName from store_group sg where sg.storeGroupId=dy.socialGroupId) as groupName, dy.readCount, dy.dzCount, dy.plCount, (select count(1) from dz_record dr where dr.dynamicId=dy.dynamicId and dr.dzUserId=#{userId}) as dzStatus, (select ua.attentionStatus from user_attention ua where ua.attentedId = dy.publishId and ua.observerId = #{userId}) as attentionStatus, date_format(dy.publishDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as publishDate from dynamic dy inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId where dy.socialGroupId = #{storeGroupId} AND dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId}) order by dy.publishDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

select count(*) from dynamic dy inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId where dy.socialGroupId = #{storeGroupId} AND dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId})

select sg.storeGroupId, sg.groupName, sg.groupImg, (select sa.attentionStatus from store_attention sa where sa.storeGroupId = sg.storeGroupId and sa.observerId = #{myId}) as attentionStatus from store_attention sa inner join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId=sa.storeGroupId where sa.observerId = #{userId} and sg.status=1 LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from store_attention sa inner join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId=sa.storeGroupId where sa.observerId = #{userId} and sg.status=1
